monologue.1: As you're advancing, more monsters start to appear. Watch out!

text: Please put me out of my misery

monologue.1: You're walking deeper into the woods... What is it with these slimes?

monologue.2: Onwards you hear a misterious sound. It seems like someone is following you.

monologue.3: More goblins seem to come your way, the ground is somewhat... shaking?

monologue.4: The shaking becomes stronger and stronger, something nasty is coming your way. Be careful!

text: How dare you kill my younglings?! You are going to pay for that!
